div1.entryFree: Swan, the bird Cygnus: Lucr. 1011. Wiv. V, 5, 7. H6A V, 3, 56. H6C I, 4, 19 (fem.). Tit. IV, 2, 102 (fem.). Rom. I, 2, 92. Ant. III, 2, 48. Cymb. III, 4, 142. Sacred to Juno: As I, 3, 77. Singing shortly before its death: and now this pale s. in her watery nest begins the sad dirge of her certain ending, Lucr. 1611. let the priest in surplice white, that defunctive music can, be the death-divining s. Phoen. 15. this pale faint s. who chants a doleful hymn to his own death, John V, 7, 21. I will play the s. and die in music, Oth. V, 2, 247.
